description_short: Soft pillow cases made of 100% cotton that protect your pillows from dust & dirt. Add a touch of warmth to your bedroom with our range of cozy pillow covers.

cover_fabric.wash_instructions: Machine wash delicate cycle, cold water, mild detergent. No bleach/softeners. Air-dry.

faq_specs.question: What sizes are available?
faq_specs.answer: Available in King, Standard, and Cuddle sizes.

notes_observed: URL says 'king' but page covers Standard/King/Cuddle. Same colorway as percale bedsheet — matching set.
